title: Morning Greeting Circle
description: Children share how they feel and practice friendship skills.

title: Block Building & Engineering
description: Children build towers, bridges, and roads while exploring shapes and stability.

title: Outdoor Running & Movement
description: Active play that develops large muscles and coordination.
adaptations: Quiet alternative zone for sensory needs

title: Interactive Story Time
description: Rich discussion and vocabulary building through high-quality picture books.
adaptations: Second reading with props for DLLs

title: Sensory Bin Exploration
description: Hands-on exploration of textures, measurement, and science concepts.

title: Art Studio - Process Art
description: Open-ended creative expression with varied materials.

title: Choice Time / Learning Centers
description: Child-led play across dramatic play, blocks, art, library, and puzzle areas.

title: Dramatic Play - Community Helpers
description: Imaginative play developing empathy, language, and social roles.
adaptations: Visual cue cards for play scenarios

title: Pattern Hunt & Creation
description: Children discover, extend, and create patterns using many materials.

title: Read Aloud + Extension Activity
description: Deep comprehension and retelling practice after a rich read aloud.

title: Water Table Investigation
description: Floating/sinking, volume, and scientific thinking with water.

title: Music & Movement Circle
description: Rhythm, coordination, and joyful self-expression through song and dance.

title: Table Puzzles & Fine Motor
description: Problem solving and hand strength with age-appropriate puzzles.

title: Outdoor Nature Walk
description: Observation skills and language development through guided exploration.

title: Emergent Writing Center
description: Scribbling, name writing, and mark-making with authentic purposes.

title: Calm Down & Self-Regulation Time
description: Tools and quiet space for children to practice calming strategies.
